zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Audley於1332年出生在英國斯塔福爾海利時，她的父親Sir James de Audley 2nd Baron Audley18歲，母親Joan de Mortimer20歲。她於1367年與Philip St Clare結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1392年在英國德比夏爾享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Audley于1332年出生在英国斯塔福爾海利时，她的父亲Sir James de Audley 2nd Baron Audley18岁，母亲Joan de Mortimer20岁。她于1367年与Philip St Clare结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1392年在英国德比夏爾享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Audley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Audley in Staffordshire, named from the Old English female personal name Aldgȳth + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Audley was born in 1332, in Heighley, Staffordshire, England, her father, Sir James de Audley 2nd Baron Audley, was 18 and her mother, Joan de Mortimer, was 20. She married Philip St Clare in 1367. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1392, in Derbyshire, England, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Audley est née en 1332, à Heighley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir James de Audley 2nd Baron Audley, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Joan de Mortimer, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Philip St Clare en 1367. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1392, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de Audley 1332 in Heighley, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir James de Audley 2nd Baron Audley 18 und ihre Mutter Joan de Mortimer 20. Sie hat 1367 Philip St Clare geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1392 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Derbyshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Audley è nata il nel 1332 nel Heighley, Staffordshire, England, sua padre, Sir James de Audley 2nd Baron Audley, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Joan de Mortimer, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Philip St Clare nel 1367. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1392, nel Derbyshire, England, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Audleyが1332年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアヘイグhリーで生まれた時，父Sir James de Audley 2nd Baron Audleyは18歳，母Joan de Mortimerは20歳であった。1367年にPhilip St Clareと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1392年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Audley(이)가 1332년 영국 스태퍼드실르 헤이리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir James de Audley 2nd Baron Audley(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Mortimer(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1367년 Philip St Clare(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1392년 영국 더비실르에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Audley nasceu em 1332, em Heighley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir James de Audley 2nd Baron Audley, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Mortimer, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Philip St Clare em 1367. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1392, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Audley родилась в 1332 г. в местности хигли, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir James de Audley 2nd Baron Audley было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Mortimer, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Philip St Clare в 1367 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1392 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan de Audley nació en 1332, en Heighley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir James de Audley 2nd Baron Audley, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Joan de Mortimer, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Philip St Clare en 1367. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1392, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años.
